A jobs.RuntimeConfig provider with no //fabrik:job or //fabrik:cron handler
hosts no worker: the worker is inferred from handler presence, not from config.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs => JOBSDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs"

//fabrik:provider
func Worker() jobs.RuntimeConfig {
	return jobs.RuntimeConfig{RunScheduler: true}
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"
)

func run() int {
	if err := func() error {
		return nil
	}(); err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return 0
}
